nodes.context: Street gang based in Birmingham, England, active from 1880s to 1920s, engaged in robbery, violence, racketeering, illegal bookmaking, and gambling.
Rival street gang in Birmingham, fought Peaky Blinders for territory.
Larger gang led by Billy Kimber, overtook Peaky Blinders in 1920.
Italian-led gang that moved in on Birmingham Boys and controlled Central England in the 1930s.
Rival gang; a member was shot and killed by Peaky Blinder William Lacey in 1905.

edges.context: Peaky Blinders fought the Sloggers for territory in Birmingham.
Birmingham Boys overtook Peaky Blinders in 1920 after conflict over racecourses.
Peaky Blinder William Lacey shot and killed a Summer Hill gang member in 1905.
Sabini gang moved in on Birmingham Boys and took control in the 1930s.
